description: Content Candidate Review Station 審核台

tasks.desc: Schema + mock data: Define models and provide 10-20 sample candidates.
Review screen MVP: Add ContentReviewScreen and route /content-review. Show list and details.
Filters + search + progress: Implement filtering and progress tracking.
Persistence: Save and load review status locally.
Import/export: JSON file handling for review results.
Export adapters: Generate catalog drafts and backlog seeds.
